allow: Bash(echo "=== 文件总数 ===" && ls llm-wiki/best-practices/bp-*.md | wc -l && echo "=== MOC 文件 ===" && ls -la llm-wiki/best-practices/best-practices-MOC.md llm-wiki/00-Maps/best-practices-MOC.md && echo "=== 文件大小分布 ===" && wc -c llm-wiki/best-practices/bp-*.md | tail -1 && echo "=== 最小文件 ===" && wc -c llm-wiki/best-practices/bp-*.md | sort -n | head -5 && echo "=== 最大文件 ===" && wc -c llm-wiki/best-practices/bp-*.md | sort -rn | head -5)

Bash(echo "=== 检查悬空 wikilink \(bp-xxx 引用但不存在的文件\) ===" && grep -ohP '\\[\\[bp-[^\\]|]+' llm-wiki/best-practices/bp-*.md | sed 's/\\[\\[//' | sort -u | while read link; do target="llm-wiki/best-practices/${link}.md"; if [ ! -f "$target" ]; then echo "BROKEN: $link"; fi; done | head -20 && echo "=== 检查完毕 ===")

Bash(echo "=== 最佳实践目录总览 ===" && find llm-wiki/best-practices/ -name "*.md" | wc -l && echo "=== 总大小 ===" && du -sh llm-wiki/best-practices/ && echo "=== 按领域分类统计 ===" && python3 -c "
import os, re
from collections import Counter
domains = Counter\(\)
risks = Counter\(\)
bp_dir = 'llm-wiki/best-practices'
for f in os.listdir\(bp_dir\):
    if not f.startswith\('bp-'\):
        continue
    path = os.path.join\(bp_dir, f\)
    with open\(path\) as fh:
        content = fh.read\(\)
    dm = re.search\(r'domain: \\"\(.+?\)\\"', content\)
    rm = re.search\(r'risk_level: \\"\(.+?\)\\"', content\)
    if dm:
        domains[dm.group\(1\)] += 1
    if rm:
        risks[rm.group\(1\)] += 1
print\('按领域:'\)
for k,v in domains.most_common\(\):
    print\(f'  {k}: {v}'\)
print\(\)
print\('按风险等级:'\)
for k,v in risks.most_common\(\):
    print\(f'  {k}: {v}'\)
")

Bash(find llm-wiki -name "*.md" -not -path "*/.obsidian/*" -not -path "*/_archives/*" | wc -l && echo "---BY_DIR---" && find llm-wiki -name "*.md" -not -path "*/.obsidian/*" -not -path "*/_archives/*" | sed 's|/[^/]*$||' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -20)

Bash(echo "=== _raw/ files ===" && find llm-wiki/_raw/ -name "*.md" 2>/dev/null | wc -l && echo "=== _staging/ files ===" && find llm-wiki/_staging/ -name "*.md" 2>/dev/null | wc -l && echo "=== best-practices files ===" && find llm-wiki/best-practices/ -name "*.md" | wc -l && echo "=== entities/commands files ===" && find llm-wiki/entities/commands/ -name "*.md" | wc -l && echo "=== 00-Maps files ===" && find llm-wiki/00-Maps/ -name "*.md" | wc -l)
